column2: Calculating paths...\nThis may take several minutes.
This scenario focuses completely on warfare. You have full control over your military forces, while the AI will handle all other aspects automatically for you.
Control the Soviet Union with full control over both your military forces and your production. AI will help you with research, diplomacy, intelligence and politics.
Control the mighty Japanese fleet and its marines, as you conquer the pacific. The AI will help you with other fronts, and handle the other aspects of your country for you.
You have full control over the production, research, politics and intelligence, as you manuever to position the United States to be ready to enter World War 2, to save the world from fascism.
You need to restart for the change to take effect.
